title: The Hart & The Vine
content:
A Hart by the hunters pursued,
    Safely hid in a Vine, till he chewed
    The sweet tender green,
    And, through shaking leaves seen,
    He was slain by his ingratitude.

    Spare Your Benefactors
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "The Hart & The Vine", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
